Gerardo Lucero

Technical Product Manager | Solutions Architect

luceroriosg@gmail.com linkedin.com/in/luceroriosg GerardoLucero Mexico City, Mexico

Profile

Over 7 years building distributed systems with Kafka on Kubernetes, implementing CI/CD pipelines in AWS and GCP, and ensuring end-to-end observability. Experienced in technical leadership across multiple teams, standardization of pipelines, and design of event-driven and hexagonal architectures. Focused on performance, reliability, and incremental delivery. Passionate about mentoring, cloud transformation, and technical excellence.

Experience

Solutions Architect

Círculo de Crédito · 2024 – Present · Full-time

Design and implement cloud-native solutions on AWS using ECS and Lambda, prioritizing scalability, resilience, and security. Lead cloud migration initiatives, strengthen observability through Dynatrace (metrics, traces, SLO/SLI), and define architectural standards for multiple teams. Currently driving the transition strategy toward OpenShift, aligning technological evolution with business and product roadmaps.

  • → AWS ECS & Lambda architecture for mission-critical financial services
  • → Dynatrace observability with SLO/SLI definition across multiple teams
  • → Leading OpenShift transition strategy aligned with product roadmaps
  • → Defining and enforcing architectural standards across engineering teams
AWSECSLambdaDynatraceOpenShiftSLO/SLI

DevSecOps Engineer

Consubanco México · 2024 · Contract

Implemented secure CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions with SAST, DAST, quality gates, code coverage, and policy-as-code to ensure regulatory compliance. Built reusable libraries for multi-platform deployments across Kubernetes, Cloud Run, and on-premise environments. Applied container hardening, secret management, and dependency scanning, while defining 'golden paths' with templates, linters, and conventions that reduced defects and accelerated delivery times.

  • → Secure CI/CD pipelines with SAST, DAST, quality gates and policy-as-code
  • → Reusable deployment libraries for Kubernetes, Cloud Run and on-premise
  • → Container hardening, secret management and dependency scanning
  • → Golden path templates reducing defects and accelerating delivery
GitHub ActionsSASTDASTKubernetesCloud RunDevSecOps

Solutions Architect / Tech Lead Product

Petco México · 2023 – 2024 · Full-time

Led and managed end-to-end technology projects, coordinating multi-disciplinary teams to ensure successful delivery of scalable solutions. Oversaw the implementation of platforms across both on-premise and cloud environments, standardizing architecture and deployment practices.

  • → End-to-end technology project leadership across multiple squads
  • → Platform implementation across on-premise and cloud environments
  • → Architecture and deployment standardization
ArchitectureTech LeadCloudOn-premiseProject Management

Technical Product Manager

Grupo Findep · 2020 – 2023 · Full-time

Directed the development of a state-machine-based digital credit storage component used across three business units, significantly improving request processing times. Managed the full lifecycle of digital payments including Oxxo, cards, direct debits and third-party integrations. Led the creation of a fully digital mobile sales application built on Kafka and Kubernetes for mission-critical scalability.

  • → State-machine credit component deployed across 3 Grupo Findep companies
  • → Full digital payments lifecycle: Oxxo, cards, direct debits, third parties
  • → Fully digital mobile sales app from concept to production
  • → Kafka + Kubernetes for mission-critical financial operations
KafkaKubernetesFintechMobilePaymentsProduct Management

Tech Lead Engineer

Microsistemas · 2017 – 2019 · Full-time

Developed and implemented a web-based car rental system that optimized payment and booking workflows. Led the design and development of a real-time reservation system enabling dynamic pricing and availability management, ensuring an efficient and user-friendly experience.

  • → Web-based car rental system with optimized payment workflows
  • → Real-time reservation system with dynamic pricing
  • → Full-stack development and team leadership
Node.jsJavaScriptReactSQLREST APIs
